authSecret.label: Authentication Secret
authSecret.help: Secret token required to connect to the WebSocket endpoint. Clients must send this token.

sttProvider.label: STT Provider Override
sttProvider.help: Override the default realtime transcription provider (e.g. deepgram, xai).

ttsProvider.label: TTS Provider Override
ttsProvider.help: Override the default speech synthesis provider (e.g. elevenlabs, azure-speech).
